attributes.name: Recipe Card
attributes.summary: The RecipeCard defines a comprehensive representation of a cooking recipe, encapsulating details such as the recipe name, description, preparation and cooking times, servings, difficulty level, cuisine type, ingredients, cooking instructions, tips, and tags. It provides multiple formatting options—embedded, fitted, isolated, tile, and card—that adapt the presentation to various display contexts. This card also computes total time, displays key stats visually, and supports rich content with markdown instructions and nested ingredient components. Its primary purpose is to serve as a structured, flexible, and visually organized recipe profile within a catalog or culinary application.
